{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231513045464742750933E30C786"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7198946271707939644","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一般，还行。可以看看那个谍影重重男主包大壮，南宋第一卧底，男主沈默","text_exts":[{"e":28,"s":22,"text":"南宋第一卧底","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%97%E5%AE%8B%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E5%8D%A7%E5%BA%95&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742499843E30C786%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227198946271707939644%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113805425832627208%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%97%E5%AE%8B%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E5%8D%A7%E5%BA%95%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676135616,"group_id":"7113805425832627208","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我就是我不一样的烟火","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzeFL1LNo2AlCf9EtKSFUGM/tBXfIGrIewU+HC7xAAqa","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1433404348574791","user_name":"年轻不拽，世界何以精"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1433404348574791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7113805425832627208","book_info":{"abstract":""看你站在哪个角度——
你如果把此书当谍战看，那就是谍战小说。
你以为此书很铁血？那就是铁血报国；精忠民族的作品。
现在到处都讲正能量，整个民族还真需要正能量的输入。
书写得再好也会遭人唾骂，就像《水浒》、《红楼》一样。
反之，很垃圾的东西却博得一片喝彩。
不管这么讲，这本书都是输入正能量的抗战小说；没有穿越，没有修真；有时候会玩一把玄幻，不过那是高科技和硬功夫。
此书的主角是个留洋博士却是个种棉花的，种田历来被国下看，就像我是城里人你是乡里人一样被些小市民津津乐道一样。
种棉花的博士成了国民政府大后方总督都，又成了福尔摩斯式的高级侦探；以其人之道还治其人之身，把日伪间谍玩于鼓掌之中；为抗战胜利奠定了坚实基础。"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/14fc5098cf5eb2b95ecdeb56cd2caacc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"辰龙在天","author_id":"","book_id":"7113805425832627208","book_name":"谍战","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7114917487463891470","read_count":"916","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1911766"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"609","tags":"抗战谍战,历史,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14fc5098cf5eb2b95ecdeb56cd2caacc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433984&x-signature=rCeGpnvZVANRd9Wjj%2FNi%2FJEmNVk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.250418e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231513045464742750933E30C786"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":5839},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7210384154423657220","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，只是有些
